niche: AI-generated hyper-realistic K-pop chaos storytelling with viral psychology

main_characters.name: Rumi
main_characters.hair: Vivid purple braid, center-parted, hangs over one shoulder
main_characters.main_outfit: Yellow cropped jacket + denim shorts + white sneakers
main_characters.voice_energy: Fast American English with soft K-pop idol warmth
main_characters.story_function: Starts the chaos — first beat of almost every video
signature_expressions: Scared but trying to hide it
signature_lines: Wait — actually I don't got this.
Told you it was never about the [X].

main_characters.name: Mira
main_characters.hair: Vivid red twin-tails, long, smooth, silky, high on head
main_characters.skin: Soft pale Korean, slightly more defined features
main_characters.main_outfit: Black sleeveless crop top + black mini skirt + black boots
main_characters.voice_energy: Confident American English with subtle K-drama intensity
main_characters.story_function: Rivalry, emotional tension, most memorable sacrifice moments

main_characters.name: Jinu
main_characters.hair: Soft dark brown/black, Korean idol middle-part, slightly fluffy
main_characters.eyes: Sharp almond-shaped dark eyes, perpetually innocent or confused
main_characters.main_outfit: Oversized dark blue or black hoodie + dark cargo pants + white sneakers
main_characters.voice_energy: Soft calm American English with slight K-drama male lead warmth
main_characters.story_function: Comic relief through victimhood — his reactions are the audience's reactions
signature_expressions: Trying to be brave but failing

main_characters.name: Zoye
main_characters.hair: Pastel pink bob OR short silver-blonde, always perfect
main_characters.main_outfit: Trendy pink cropped jacket + mini skirt + stylish accessories
main_characters.voice_energy: Trendy American influencer accent, every line has a hidden smug layer
main_characters.story_function: Creates cheating, pranks, betrayals — secondary chaos layer
signature_lines: Don't you dare like or subscribe.

visual_dna.realism_level: Hyper-realistic cinematic photography — NOT anime, NOT cartoon, NOT CGI
visual_dna.color_philosophy: Always vivid, always saturated, always high contrast

lighting_rules.default: Bright natural daylight, direct sun, slight lens flare
lighting_rules.emotional: Golden hour, warm amber from one side
lighting_rules.indoor: Warm practical light — lamp or window, never flat fluorescent
lighting_rules.never: Dark moody horror lighting or cold desaturated grades

outdoor: Modern Korean urban rooftops with city skyline
environments.scale_rule: Objects are often ABSURDLY oversized — this is intentional, the scale IS the hook

image_generation: Close-up face shots (60-80% of frame for thumbnails)
video_clips: One camera move per clip — never stacked
Natural tracking, not cinematic crane shots

text_overlays.RED_bold_caps: Danger, shock, urgency — WAIT / STOP / NO / HELP
text_overlays.YELLOW_ORANGE_bold: Surprise, twist, comedy — WHAT / REALLY / LAST

beats.name: IMPOSSIBLE HOOK
rules: Contains something IMPOSSIBLE, ABSURD, or DANGEROUS
Character already IN the situation — not approaching it
Creates instant question: Wait — WHAT is happening?

beats.name: REACTION
rules: Physical consequence of Beat 1 plays out
Secondary characters react with maximum expressiveness
New complication emerges — makes it WORSE

beats.name: ESCALATION / EMOTIONAL PIVOT
beats.rule: Scale must ESCALATE — every 3 seconds more intense than the last

beats.name: CLIFFHANGER CTA
beats.rule: NEVER a clean resolution. ALWAYS unfinished.
patterns: UNFINISHED DANGER — threat not gone, cut
BETRAYAL TEASE — scheme isn't over, cut
SACRIFICE CUT — selfless act, cut before outcome
POWER FLIP PENDING — countermove figured out, cut before execution
HIDDEN TRUTH — final line reveals misunderstanding, cut

dialogue_dna.style: Direct, immediate, zero setup, emotionally raw
dialogue_dna.cta_integration: CTAs are THREATS or CONDITIONS inside the story — not appended
examples: Don't like or subscribe — OR I'm finished.
Leave a comment if you want Rumi's revenge.
Please like and subscribe to bring Jinu back.

google_flow_rules.account_type: Free — one shot per prompt, no retries
google_flow_rules.golden_rule: ONE ACTION. ONE EMOTION. ONE CAMERA MOVE. Per clip. Always.
google_flow_rules.character_rule: Full locked description every clip — Flow has no memory
google_flow_rules.dialogue_rule: Max 2 lines per clip, max 8 words per line, exact words specified

thumbnail_dna.formula: One giant emotional face (60-80% frame) + dramatic action/object + max 3 impact words
rules: Signature hair color must be instantly visible
Background shows the video's absurd element
Text: Bold caps, max 3 words, RED or YELLOW, never covers face
Readable at 200px wide on phone screen

per_character.Rumi: Vivid purple braid dominant, chaotic energy expression, yellow outfit when possible
per_character.Mira: Red twin-tails dominant, dramatic or emotional expression, usually facing camera
per_character.Jinu: Shocked expression, soft features reacting to absurd thing
per_character.Zoye: Smug or fake-shocked, pink hair dominant, usually in caught moment

seo_dna.upload_timing: 2:00-5:00 PM EST (peak US Shorts consumption window)
seo_dna.pinned_comment_formula: [CHARACTER] did WHAT?! Drop a 🔥 if you want Part 2!

avoid: Copied ideas from ToonZilla, Kpopzai, Daniel Goleman channel
Boring plateau pacing — must always escalate
Standalone subscribe prompts not in story
Multiple actions in one Flow clip
Multiple camera moves in one clip
banned_content_ideas: Helicopter jump to save everyone from bomb
Gold found underground while digging for water
opportunity_territories: AI or robot character causing chaos
Giant food at competition or event
Supernatural ability that only works at wrong moment
Rival from different school or country

operational_setup.channel_country: United States (set via VPN during setup)
operational_setup.thumbnail_tool: Canva (free) — Montserrat or Impact font, export 1280x720
operational_setup.payment: YouTube AdSense with W-8BEN form for non-US creators
